evals.name: microsd-interface-mode
evals.prompt: data/E1005_v01 项目中，MicroSD卡槽使用的是什么接口模式？是SDIO还是SPI？请给出判断依据。
evals.expected_output: SPI模式。片选信号为GPIO8。MicroSD卡槽物理上支持SDIO，但D1/D2/D3数据线未连接到ESP32-S3控制器（只连接到ESD保护器件），只有D0(MOSI)、CLK、CMD(CS/GPIO8)连到控制器，因此实际工作在SPI模式。

assertions.description: Answer identifies SPI as the actual interface mode
Answer does NOT conclude the interface is SDIO or 4-bit mode
Answer mentions GPIO8 as chip select signal
Answer mentions that D1/D2/D3 or some data lines are not connected to the MCU

evals.name: bq27220-power-domain
evals.prompt: data/E1005_v01 项目中，U5 BQ27220的供电来自哪里？它的VDD引脚连到什么网络？VDD_3V3和BQ27220有什么关系？
evals.expected_output: BQ27220是库仑计，由VBAT（约4V电池电压）供电，通过REGIN引脚输入。VDD引脚由BQ27220内部LDO从VBAT生成1.8V，不连接外部电源网络。电流采样通过SRN和SRP引脚完成。VDD_3V3与BQ27220没有连接关系。

assertions.description: Answer identifies VBAT as the supply source for BQ27220
Answer mentions internal LDO or 1.8V output
Answer does NOT say VDD_3V3 powers BQ27220
Answer mentions SRN/SRP pins for current sampling
Answer states VDD_3V3 has no connection to BQ27220

evals.name: i2c-bus-devices
evals.prompt: data/E1005_v01 项目中，I2C总线上挂载了哪些器件？各自的I2C地址是什么？有没有设计问题？
evals.expected_output: I2C总线共5个器件：U5 BQ27220(0x55)、U6 SHT40-AD1B-R2(0x44)、U14 PCF8563M/TR(0x51)、U15 LSM6DS3TR-C(0x6A)、U16 SHT40-AD1B-R2(0x44)。设计问题：U6和U16均为SHT40-AD1B-R2，I2C地址均为0x44，存在地址冲突。

assertions.description: Answer lists all 5 I2C devices (U5, U6, U14, U15, U16)
Answer includes correct I2C addresses
Answer flags the address conflict between U6 and U16

evals.name: i2c-address-conflict
evals.prompt: data/E1005_v01 项目中，请审查I2C总线设计，有没有潜在的设计问题？
evals.expected_output: U6和U16都是SHT40-AD1B-R2温湿度传感器，I2C地址均固定为0x44，两个器件挂在同一I2C总线上会产生地址冲突，无法独立寻址，这是一个设计缺陷。

assertions.description: Answer identifies both U6 and U16 as the conflicting devices
Answer states the conflicting address is 0x44
Answer characterizes this as a design problem/conflict

evals.name: spi-bus-topology
evals.prompt: data/E1005_v01 项目中，有几组SPI总线？每组分别连接了哪些器件？片选信号是什么？
evals.expected_output: 两组SPI总线：(1) QSPI总线接256Mb SPI Flash，U9和U17是同一Flash的不同封装备选，只装其中一个；(2) 普通SPI总线接SD card（片选GPIO8）和E-paper（片选GPIO15）。

assertions.description: Answer identifies two separate SPI buses
Answer mentions U9 and U17 as alternate Flash options on QSPI
Answer identifies SD card chip select as GPIO8
Answer identifies E-paper chip select as GPIO15

evals.name: epaper-interface-unidirectional
evals.prompt: data/E1005_v01 项目中，E-paper显示屏的SPI接口有什么特别的地方？
evals.expected_output: E-paper的SPI接口是单向的（只有上行信号），没有MISO信号线，ESP32-S3无法从E-paper读取数据。片选信号为GPIO15。这是E-paper显示屏的典型设计，只需写入显示数据，不需要读取。

assertions.description: Answer identifies E-paper SPI as write-only / unidirectional / no MISO
Answer mentions GPIO15 as the chip select
